# NotebookLM MCP Skills & Setup

This repository contains setup instructions for NotebookLM MCP and a system for creating Antigravity Skills.

## 📁 Repository Structure (專案結構)

- `notebooklm-setup.md`: Guide for connecting Antigravity to NotebookLM via MCP.
- `antigravity-skill-creator.md`: Detailed instructions for the "Skill Creator" system.
- `.agent/skills/`: Active skills for the Antigravity environment.
  - `creating-antigravity-skills/`: The meta-skill for building other skills.

---

## 🚀 Quick Start (快速開始)

### 1. Setup NotebookLM MCP
Follow the steps in [notebooklm-setup.md](./notebooklm-setup.md) to install and authorize the MCP server.

### 2. Use the Skill Creator
Read [antigravity-skill-creator.md](./antigravity-skill-creator.md) to understand how to prompt your agent to build new capabilities.

---

## 🛠 Features (功能特性)

- **Standardized Skills**: Predictable folder hierarchy and YAML frontmatter.
- **Bi-lingual Support**: All core documentation includes Chinese annotations.
- **Meta-Skill Driven**: Built-in logic to help the agent self-improve and create new modular functions.
